name: LoginForm
description: A complete login form with email and password fields, validation, and submit handling

visual.description: Centered card with vertical stack layout. Title at top, email and password inputs with labels, forgot password link, and prominent submit button. Uses primary color for button, neutral borders for inputs.

props.name: title
props.description: Form title displayed at the top

props.name: showForgotPassword
props.description: Whether to show the forgot password link
